stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
In accordance with the given flight log, the planned fuel at point C is 383 kg, the Minimum Fuel is 345 kg and the fuel check is 437 kg. What is true about the fuel status and what is the appropriate course of action?

options.a: Fuel is below minimum, divert to the nearest alternate aerodrome.
options.b: Fuel is at planned level, continue as planned.
options.c: Fuel is above planned, you can accept a delay if required.
